description:
Recto: Legal document. Location: Alexandria, based in part on the names of the people involved. Dated: 22 Sivan (4)802 AM = 15 June 1042 CE. In which Nuḥaym b. Maymūn and Khulayf b. Furayḥ Zibrij present themselves to court in the week after the death of Surūra, daughter of Nuḥaym and wife of Khulayf b. Furayḥ. Surūra’s sister, Sitt al-Dār, had previously been engaged to Khulayf b. Yeshuʿa Nārūz as a girl of seven on condition that the latter would bring her home after three years. It is now indicated that she shall marry Khulayf b. Furayḥ in her sister’s place. The document includes testimonies by the cantor Sahl b. Moshe, Naḥmān b. Ṣedaqa, Sarī b. Ḥayyim the teacher, Azhar b. Shimʿon, Mevasser b. Naḥum and others. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)

See separate record for the Arabic on verso.
description_he: שטר משפטי מאלכסנדריה, כ"ב סיון 4802 (15 ביוני 1042). נוחיים בן מיימון וח'לייף בן פוריח מתייצבים בבית הדין לאחר מות סרורה בתו של נוחיים ואשת ח'לייף. אחות סרורה, סת אל-דאר, תינשא לח'לייף בן פוריח תחת אחותה.
